narrative:
Cols 58-E (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,080 registered voters, with 67.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 14.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.3%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.2 percentage points.
